ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Courageous Heart Yajirobe'. Vision confirms heavyset man with long dark hair in dark gi with nervous/wary posture — canonical Yajirobe look. Named card, not a role-card.

trivia_bullets.text: Union Force (DBS-B02) was released November 3, 2017 as the Dragon Ball Super Card Game's second booster set. [dbs-cardgame.com, via WebSearch snippet]

Yajirobe's introduction to the Dragon Ball saga is his killing of Cymbal during the King Piccolo Saga. After slicing Cymbal in half with his sword, Yajirobe roasted and ate him — remarking he was 'excellent meat.' This is the franchise's most distinctive death-beat in the saga's middle act. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Yajirobe; Dragon Ball Wiki: Cymbal, via WebSearch snippets]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Yajirobe, via WebSearch snippet
Dragon Ball Wiki: Cymbal, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Yajirobe is a permanent resident of Korin Tower, the training ground beneath The Lookout. He is one of the few mortal humans with consistent access to Korin's Senzu Beans — the Z Warriors' primary healing resource — making him a logistical linchpin despite never fighting in major battles. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Yajirobe, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Yajirobe, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Yajirobe's single greatest combat contribution in the Z saga is cutting off Vegeta's Great Ape tail during the Saiyan Saga — an act he performed from behind, while Vegeta was distracted, entirely in keeping with his reluctant-survivor archetype. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Yajirobe, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Yajirobe, via WebSearch snippet
